title: UI Button Component Contract
purpose: Define the shared contract for button surfaces in the UI design system.
scope: This specification covers the `ui-button` block, its primary and secondary variants, its size modifiers, and its shared disabled and focus-visible states. It does not define iconography, menu behavior, or application-specific actions.
context: The button contract stays small so the example can show how a component spec consumes shared conventions, tokens, and foundation rules without restating those shared rules in full.

requirements.title: Expose the button block surface
requirements.statement: The button component MUST expose the `ui-button` block surface, satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0001`, and use `space-control-x-medium` for default inline spacing.

requirements.title: Define the primary button variant
requirements.statement: The `ui-button--primary` modifier MUST use `color-action-primary` and satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0003`.

requirements.title: Define the secondary button variant
requirements.statement: The `ui-button--secondary` modifier MUST use `color-action-secondary` and satisfy `REQ-UI-CONVENTIONS-0003`.

requirements.title: Define button size modifiers
requirements.statement: The `ui-button--sm`, `ui-button--md`, and `ui-button--lg` modifiers MUST map to `control-height-small`, `control-height-medium`, and `control-height-large`.
